ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Change dropdown to modify different groups of settings
ast.target: 更改下拉菜单以修改不同的设置组

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Change dropdown to modify styles and settings of different codeblock sections
ast.target: 更改下拉菜单以修改不同代码块部分的样式和设置

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: If enabled, styling will be applied when exporting to PDF.
ast.target: 如果启用，导出为 PDF 时将应用样式。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Create a new theme from the current settings.
ast.target: 从当前设置创建新主题。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Determines how rounded the codeblocks appear in pixels.
ast.target: 决定代码块在像素中的圆角程度。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: If enabled, languages with icons display a left border with the colour of the icon. The slider sets the width of the border.
ast.target: 如果启用，带有图标的语言会显示一个与图标颜色相同的左边框。滑块设置边框的宽度。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Choose whether to unwrap lines in reading mode
ast.target: 选择是否在阅读模式下自动换行

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: If enabled, in reading mode, holding click on a codeblock will wrap the lines for better visibility.
ast.target: 如果启用，在阅读模式下，按住点击代码块将自动换行以获得更好的可见性。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: If disabled, the below settings are disabled too.
ast.target: 如果禁用，以下设置也将被禁用。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: If enabled, highlights will also highlight the line numbers.
ast.target: 如果启用，高亮也会高亮行号。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: If enabled, the current line number in codeblocks will be indicated with a separate colour.
ast.target: 如果启用，代码块中的当前行号将用单独的颜色指示。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Set the font size for header language tags and titles.
ast.target: 设置标题语言标签和标题的字体大小。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Style the header title text using bold and italic toggles, by setting a font or by setting a text colour.
ast.target: 通过设置字体或文本颜色，使用粗体和斜体切换来样式化标题标题文本。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Title placeholder text for folded code when no title parameter is set.
ast.target: 当未设置标题参数时，折叠代码的标题占位符文本。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Colour of the line separating the codeblock header and the codeblock.
ast.target: 分隔代码块标题和代码块的线条颜色。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Determine when to show language tags in the header. "Title Only" will only show language tags when the title parameter is set.
ast.target: 确定何时在标题中显示语言标签。“仅标题”将仅在设置了标题参数时显示语言标签。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Determine when to show language icons where available. "Title Only" will only show language tags when the title parameter is set.
ast.target: 确定何时在可用时显示语言图标。“仅标题”将仅在设置了标题参数时显示语言标签。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Style the header language tag text using bold and italic toggles, by setting a font or by setting a text colour.
ast.target: 通过设置字体或文本颜色，使用粗体和斜体切换来样式化标题语言标签文本。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: If disabled, language icons will be black and white.
ast.target: 如果禁用，语言图标将变为黑白。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Set the size of the displayed language icons.
ast.target: 设置显示语言图标的大小。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Display repository in codeblock header for external references.
ast.target: 在代码块头部显示外部引用的仓库。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Display repository version in codeblock header for external references.
ast.target: 在代码块头部显示外部引用的仓库版本。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Display the timestamp at which the reference was last updated.
ast.target: 显示引用最后更新的时间戳。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: If enabled, highlights the active line inside codeblocks.
ast.target: 如果启用，高亮代码块中的活动行。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Define a new alternative highlight name. The colour can be modified after it is added.
ast.target: 定义一个新的替代高亮名称。添加后可以修改颜色。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: If enabled, highlights fade away to the right. The slider sets the gradient colour stop as a percentage.
ast.target: 如果启用，高亮会向右淡出。滑块设置渐变颜色停止的百分比。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Define languages in a comma separated list which the plugin should not decorate. You can use a wildcard (*) either at the beginning, or at the end. For example: ad-* will exclude codeblocks where the language starts with ad- e.g.: ad-info, ad-error etc.
ast.target: 以逗号分隔列表定义插件不应装饰的语言。可以在开头或结尾使用通配符 (*)。例如：ad-* 将排除语言以 ad- 开头的代码块，如 ad-info、ad-error 等。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Define languages in a comma separated list which the plugin should style despite being processed by another plugin. You can use a wildcard (*) either at the beginning, or at the end. For example: ad-* will exclude codeblocks where the language starts with ad- e.g.: ad-info, ad-error etc.
ast.target: 以逗号分隔列表定义插件应样式化的语言，即使这些语言已被其他插件处理。可以在开头或结尾使用通配符 (*)。例如：ad-* 将排除语言以 ad- 开头的代码块，如 ad-info、ad-error 等。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Use this textbox to redirect specific language colours and icons as a JSON with language names as keys and either a colour key, an icon key or both as the value for a given language. Colours should be passed as CSS colours and icons should be passed as a string of the inside of an svg element. This setting is theme independent.
ast.target: 使用此文本框以JSON格式重定向特定语言的颜色和图标，键为语言名称，值为该语言的颜色键、图标键或两者。颜色应作为CSS颜色传递，图标应作为SVG元素内部的字符串传递。此设置与主题无关。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: If enabled, in reading mode, inline code will be syntax highlighted based on a language set with `{language} highlighted_inline_code`. See the README for more information.
ast.target: 如果启用，在阅读模式下，内联代码将根据使用`{language} highlighted_inline_code`设置的语言进行语法高亮。有关更多信息，请参阅README。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: If enabled, inline code will be styled.
ast.target: 如果启用，内联代码将被样式化。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: The text colour of inline code titles.
ast.target: 内联代码标题的文本颜色。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Determines how bold inline code titles appear.
ast.target: 确定内联代码标题的加粗程度。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: The text colour when editing inline code.
ast.target: 编辑内联代码时的文本颜色。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Determines how bold inline code appears.
ast.target: 确定内联代码的加粗程度。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Determines how rounded inline code appear in pixels.
ast.target: 确定内联代码的圆角像素值。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Determines how much vertical inner padding in pixels inline code has.
ast.target: 确定内联代码的垂直内边距像素值。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Determines how much horizontal inner padding in pixels inline code has.
ast.target: 确定内联代码的水平内边距像素值。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Determines how much horizontal outer margin is added to the inline code in pixels.
ast.target: 确定内联代码水平方向添加多少像素的外边距。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: If enabled, highlights the active line outside codeblocks.
ast.target: 如果启用，将高亮显示代码块外的活动行。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: If enabled, external references will be updated automatically on load when possible.
ast.target: 如果启用，将在加载时尽可能自动更新外部引用。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: This will return all inbuilt themes to the plugin defaults
ast.target: 这将把所有内置主题恢复为插件默认值。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Used for UI buttons like the copy code button.
ast.target: 用于UI按钮，如复制代码按钮。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.target: 颜色按钮激活时使用的颜色。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Parameters and language which would follow codeblock delimiter.
ast.target: 参数和语言，将跟随代码块分隔符。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Text to render as example inside code delimiters.
ast.target: 在代码分隔符内渲染为示例的文本。

ast.name: setName
ast.target: 标题语言标签背景颜色

ast.name: setName
ast.target: 标题语言标签文本样式

ast.name: setName
ast.target: 内联代码标题字体粗细

ast.name: setName
ast.target: 内联代码活动文本颜色

ast.name: setName
ast.source: External References Automatic Update on Load
ast.target: 外部引用加载时自动更新

ast.name: setName
ast.target: 示例代码块参数字符串

ast.name: setTooltip
ast.target: 切换粗体语言标签文本

ast.name: setTooltip
ast.target: 切换斜体语言标签文本

ast.name: setTooltip
ast.target: 切换编辑器活动行高亮

ast.name: setTooltip
ast.target: 切换自动更新外部引用

ast.name: warn
ast.target: 警告：无法解析计算字符串

ast.name: warn
ast.target: 警告：无法获取当前主题

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Select a theme first to delete
ast.target: 请先选择一个主题以删除

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: You cannot delete the default themes

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Set a name for your theme
ast.target: 为您的主题设置一个名称

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: You can't overwrite the default themes

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Cannot override the default highlight parameter.
ast.target: 无法覆盖默认的高亮参数。

ast.name: Notice
ast.target: 无法使用其他默认参数。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Unexpected element after head. Expected the element before `</head>`
ast.target: 在 head 之后出现了意外的元素。期望在 `</head>` 之前出现该元素

ast.name: description
ast.source: Unexpected `>` or `->`. Expected `-->` to close comments
ast.target: 意外的 `>` 或 `->`。期望 `-->` 来关闭注释

ast.name: description
ast.source: Unexpected `>`. Expected a closing `"` or `'` after the public identifier
ast.target: 意外的 `>`。期望在公共标识符后出现闭合的 `"` 或 `'`

ast.name: description
ast.source: Unexpected `>`. Expected a closing `"` or `'` after the identifier identifier
ast.target: 意外的 `>`。期望在标识符后出现闭合的 `"` 或 `'`

ast.name: description
ast.source: Unexpected `%c`. Expected `[0-9]` for decimal references or `[0-9a-fA-F]` for hexadecimal references
ast.target: 意外的 `%c`。期望十进制引用使用 `[0-9]`，十六进制引用使用 `[0-9a-fA-F]`

ast.name: description
ast.source: Unexpected `<![CDATA[` in HTML. Remove it, use a comment, or encode special characters instead
ast.target: HTML 中出现了意外的 `<![CDATA[`。请移除它，改用注释，或对特殊字符进行编码

ast.name: description
ast.source: Unexpectedly high character reference. Expected character references to be at most hexadecimal 10ffff (or decimal 1114111)
ast.target: 字符引用异常高。期望字符引用最多为十六进制 10ffff（或十进制 1114111）

ast.name: description
ast.source: Unexpectedly closing tag. Expected other tags to be closed first
ast.target: 意外的闭合标签。期望先闭合其他标签

ast.name: description
ast.source: Unexpected control character `%x`. Expected a non-control code point, 0x00, or ASCII whitespace
ast.target: 意外的控制字符 `%x`。期望一个非控制码点、0x00 或 ASCII 空白字符

ast.name: description
ast.source: Unexpectedly control character in reference. Expected a non-control code point, 0x00, or ASCII whitespace
ast.target: 引用中意外的控制字符。期望一个非控制码点、0x00 或 ASCII 空白字符

ast.name: description
ast.source: Unexpected text character `%c`. Only use text in `<noscript>`s in `<body>`
ast.target: 意外的文本字符 `%c`。仅在 `<body>` 中的 `<noscript>` 内使用文本

ast.name: description
ast.source: Unexpectedly double attribute. Expected attributes to occur only once
ast.target: 意外的重复属性。期望每个属性只出现一次

ast.name: description
ast.target: 意外的属性。期望 `>` 代替

ast.name: description
ast.source: Unexpected end tag. Expected no end tag or another end tag
ast.target: 意外的结束标签。期望没有结束标签或另一个结束标签

ast.name: description
ast.source: Unexpected end of file. Expected tag name instead
ast.target: 意外的文件结尾。期望标签名代替

ast.name: description
ast.source: Unexpected end of file. Expected `]]>` to close the CDATA
ast.target: 意外的文件结尾。期望 `]]>` 来关闭 CDATA

ast.name: description
ast.source: Unexpected end of file. Expected `-->` to close the comment
ast.target: 意外的文件结尾。期望 `-->` 来关闭注释

ast.name: description
ast.source: Unexpected end of file. Expected a valid doctype (such as `<!doctype html>`)
ast.target: 意外的文件结尾。期望一个有效的文档类型（例如 `<!doctype html>`）

ast.name: description
ast.source: Unexpected end of file. Expected text or a closing tag
ast.target: 意外的文件结尾。期望文本或结束标签

ast.name: description
ast.source: Unexpected end of file. Expected `>` to close the tag
ast.target: 意外的文件结尾。期望 `>` 来关闭标签

ast.name: description
ast.source: Unexpected `%c-1`. Expected `-->` to close the comment
ast.target: 意外的 `%c-1`。期望 `-->` 来关闭注释

ast.name: description
ast.source: Unexpected `%c`. Expected `<!--` to open the comment
ast.target: 意外的 `%c`。期望 `<!--` 来打开注释

ast.name: description
ast.target: 在 `%c` 处出现意外序列。期望 `public` 或 `system`

ast.name: description
ast.source: Unexpected `%c`. Expected an ASCII letter instead
ast.target: 意外的 `%c`。期望一个 ASCII 字母

ast.name: description
ast.source: Unexpected doctype. Expected doctype before head
ast.target: 意外的文档类型。期望在 head 之前有文档类型

ast.name: description
ast.source: Unexpected start tag `<head>`. Expected `<head>` directly after doctype
ast.target: 意外的开始标签 `<head>`。期望在文档类型之后直接出现 `<head>`

ast.name: description
ast.source: Unexpected `%c-1`. Expected an attribute value or no `%c-1` instead
ast.target: 意外的 `%c-1`。期望属性值或没有 `%c-1`

ast.name: description
ast.source: Expected a `<!doctype html>` before anything else

ast.name: description
ast.source: Unexpected doctype end at `%c`. Expected `html` instead
ast.target: 在`%c`处遇到意外的文档类型结束。期望的是`html`

ast.name: description
ast.target: 遇到意外的`%c`。期望的是用于`public`的标识符

ast.name: description
ast.target: 遇到意外的`%c`。期望的是用于`system`的标识符（建议：`"about:legacy-compat"`）

ast.name: description
ast.target: 遇到意外的`%c`。期望的是`"`或`'`

ast.name: description
ast.target: 遇到意外的`%c`。期望的是ASCII空白字符

ast.name: description
ast.source: Unexpected `<noscript>`. Expected a closing tag or a meta element
ast.target: 遇到意外的`<noscript>`。期望的是结束标签或meta元素

ast.name: description
ast.target: 期望的是`<!doctype html>`或`<!doctype html system "about:legacy-compat">`

ast.name: description
ast.source: Unexpected code point. Do not use noncharacters in HTML
ast.target: 意外的码点。不要在 HTML 中使用非字符

ast.name: description
ast.source: Unexpected code point `%x`. Do not use noncharacters in HTML
ast.target: 意外的码点 `%x`。不要在 HTML 中使用非字符

ast.name: description
ast.source: Unexpected code point. Do not use NULL characters in HTML
ast.target: 意外的码点。不要在 HTML 中使用 NULL 字符

ast.name: description
ast.source: Unexpected end of file. Expected closing tag instead
ast.target: 意外的文件结尾。期望的是结束标签

ast.name: description
ast.source: Unexpected code point. Do not use lone surrogate characters in HTML
ast.target: 意外的码点。不要在 HTML 中使用孤立的代理项字符

ast.name: description
ast.source: Unexpected code point `%x`. Do not use lone surrogate characters in HTML
ast.target: 意外的码点 `%x`。不要在 HTML 中使用孤立的代理项字符

ast.name: description
ast.target: 在 `%c` 处出现意外的字符。期望的是 `>`

ast.name: description
ast.source: Unexpected `%c`. Expected whitespace, `/`, `>`, `=`, or probably an ASCII letter
ast.target: 意外的 `%c`。期望的是空白、`/`、`>`、`=` 或可能是 ASCII 字母

ast.name: description
ast.source: Unexpected `%c`. Quote the attribute value to include it
ast.target: 意外的 `%c`。请用引号括起属性值以包含它

ast.name: description
ast.source: Unexpected `%c`. Add an attribute name before it
ast.target: 意外的 `%c`。请在其前添加属性名称

ast.name: description
ast.source: Unexpected code point `%x`. Do not use NULL characters in HTML
ast.target: 意外的代码点 `%x`。不要在 HTML 中使用 NULL 字符

ast.name: description
ast.source: Unexpected `%c-1`. Expected it followed by `>` or in a quoted attribute value
ast.target: 意外的 `%c-1`。预期其后跟 `>` 或位于引用的属性值中

ast.name: description
ast.source: Unexpected character reference. Expected known named character references
ast.target: 意外的字符引用。预期为已知的命名字符引用

ast.name: name
ast.source: Reset fold state for all codeblocks
ast.target: 重置所有代码块的折叠状态

ast.name: name
ast.source: Update all external references in vault
ast.target: 更新库中所有外部引用

ast.name: name
ast.source: Update all external references in note
ast.target: 更新笔记中所有外部引用

ast.name: name
ast.target: 移除所有不需要的外部引用

ast.name: text
ast.source: Settings for the Code Styler Plugin.

ast.name: text
ast.source: If you like this plugin, and would like to help support continued development, use the button below!
ast.target: 如果您喜欢这个插件，并希望帮助支持持续开发，请使用下面的按钮！

regex.source: setDesc("Define languages in a comma separated list which the plugin should not decorate. You can use a wildcard (*) either at the beginning, or at the end. For example: ad-* will exclude codeblocks where the language starts with ad- e.g.: ad-info, ad-error etc.")
regex.target: setDesc("定义插件不应装饰的语言列表，以逗号分隔。您可以在开头或结尾使用通配符 (*)。例如：ad-* 将排除语言以 ad- 开头的代码块，例如：ad-info、ad-error 等。")
setName("白名单已处理的代码块")

regex.source: setDesc("Define languages in a comma separated list which the plugin should style despite being processed by another plugin. You can use a wildcard (*) either at the beginning, or at the end. For example: ad-* will exclude codeblocks where the language starts with ad- e.g.: ad-info, ad-error etc.")
regex.target: setDesc("定义插件应样式化的语言列表，以逗号分隔，即使这些语言已被其他插件处理。您可以在开头或结尾使用通配符 (*)。例如：ad-* 将排除语言以 ad- 开头的代码块，例如：ad-info、ad-error 等。")

regex.source: text: "Settings for the Code Styler Plugin."
text: "If you like this plugin, and would like to help support continued development, use the button below!"
regex.target: text: "如果您喜欢这个插件，并希望帮助支持其持续开发，请使用下面的按钮！"

regex.source: description: "Unexpected element after head. Expected the element before `</head>`"
regex.target: description: "head 后出现意外元素。期望在 `</head>` 之前出现该元素"

regex.source: description: "Unexpected `>` or `->`. Expected `-->` to close comments"
regex.target: description: "出现意外的 `>` 或 `->`。期望使用 `-->` 来关闭注释"

regex.source: description: "Unexpected `%c`. Expected `[0-9]` for decimal references or `[0-9a-fA-F]` for hexadecimal references"
regex.target: description: "出现意外的 `%c`。十进制引用期望 `[0-9]`，十六进制引用期望 `[0-9a-fA-F]`"

regex.source: description: "Unexpected `<![CDATA[` in HTML. Remove it, use a comment, or encode special characters instead"
regex.target: description: "HTML 中出现意外的 `<![CDATA[`。请移除它，改用注释，或对特殊字符进行编码"

regex.source: description: "Unexpectedly high character reference. Expected character references to be at most hexadecimal 10ffff (or decimal 1114111)"
regex.target: description: "字符引用值过高。期望字符引用最多为十六进制 10ffff（或十进制 1114111）"

regex.source: description: "Unexpectedly closing tag. Expected other tags to be closed first"
regex.target: description: "出现意外的结束标签。期望先关闭其他标签"

regex.source: description: "Unexpected control character `%x`. Expected a non-control code point, 0x00, or ASCII whitespace"
regex.target: description: "出现意外的控制字符 `%x`。期望非控制码点、0x00 或 ASCII 空白字符"

regex.source: description: "Unexpectedly control character in reference. Expected a non-control code point, 0x00, or ASCII whitespace"
regex.target: description: "引用中出现意外的控制字符。期望非控制码点、0x00 或 ASCII 空白字符"

regex.source: description: "Unexpected text character `%c`. Only use text in `<noscript>`s in `<body>`"
regex.target: description: "出现意外的文本字符 `%c`。仅在 `<body>` 中的 `<noscript>` 内使用文本"

regex.source: description: "Unexpectedly double attribute. Expected attributes to occur only once"
regex.target: description: "意外的重复属性。期望每个属性只出现一次"

regex.source: description: "Unexpected end tag. Expected no end tag or another end tag"
regex.target: description: "意外的结束标签。期望没有结束标签或另一个结束标签"

regex.source: description: "Unexpected end of file. Expected tag name instead"
regex.target: description: "意外的文件结尾。期望出现标签名称"

regex.source: description: "Unexpected end of file. Expected `]]>` to close the CDATA"
regex.target: description: "意外的文件结尾。期望出现 `]]>` 来关闭 CDATA"

regex.source: description: "Unexpected end of file. Expected `-->` to close the comment"
regex.target: description: "意外的文件结尾。期望出现 `-->` 来关闭注释"

regex.source: description: "Unexpected end of file. Expected a valid doctype (such as `<!doctype html>`)"
regex.target: description: "意外的文件结尾。期望出现有效的文档类型（例如 `<!doctype html>`）"

regex.source: description: "Unexpected end of file. Expected text or a closing tag"
regex.target: description: "意外的文件结尾。期望出现文本或结束标签"

regex.source: description: "Unexpected end of file. Expected `>` to close the tag"
regex.target: description: "意外的文件结尾。期望出现 `>` 来关闭标签"

regex.source: description: "Unexpected `%c-1`. Expected `-->` to close the comment"
regex.target: description: "意外的 `%c-1`。期望 `-->` 来关闭注释"

regex.source: description: "Unexpected `%c`. Expected `<!--` to open the comment"
regex.target: description: "意外的 `%c`。期望 `<!--` 来打开注释"
description: "在 `%c` 处出现意外序列。期望 `public` 或 `system`"

regex.source: description: "Unexpected `%c`. Expected an ASCII letter instead"
regex.target: description: "意外的 `%c`。期望一个 ASCII 字母"

regex.source: description: "Unexpected doctype. Expected doctype before head"
regex.target: description: "意外的文档类型。期望在 head 之前有文档类型"

regex.source: description: "Unexpected start tag `<head>`. Expected `<head>` directly after doctype"
regex.target: description: "意外的开始标签 `<head>`。期望在文档类型之后直接出现 `<head>`"

regex.source: description: "Unexpected `%c-1`. Expected an attribute value or no `%c-1` instead"
regex.target: description: "意外的 `%c-1`。期望一个属性值或没有 `%c-1`"

regex.source: description: "Expected a `<!doctype html>` before anything else"
regex.target: description: "期望在任何其他内容之前有一个 `<!doctype html>`"

regex.source: description: "Unexpected doctype end at `%c`. Expected `html` instead"
regex.target: description: "在 `%c` 处意外的文档类型结束。期望 `html`"
description: "意外的 `%c`。期望 `public` 的标识符"
description: '意外的 `%c`。应为 `system` 的标识符（建议：`"about:legacy-compat"`）'
description: "意外的 `%c`。应为 ASCII 空白字符"

regex.source: description: "Unexpected `<noscript>`. Expected a closing tag or a meta element"
regex.target: description: "意外的 `<noscript>`。应为结束标签或 meta 元素"
description: '应为 `<!doctype html>` 或 `<!doctype html system "about:legacy-compat">`'

regex.source: description: "Unexpected code point. Do not use noncharacters in HTML"
regex.target: description: "意外的码点。不要在 HTML 中使用非字符"

regex.source: description: "Unexpected code point `%x`. Do not use noncharacters in HTML"
regex.target: description: "意外的码点 `%x`。不要在 HTML 中使用非字符"

regex.source: description: "Unexpected code point. Do not use NULL characters in HTML"
regex.target: description: "意外的码点。不要在 HTML 中使用 NULL 字符"

regex.source: description: "Unexpected end of file. Expected closing tag instead"
regex.target: description: "意外的文件结尾。应为结束标签"

regex.source: description: "Unexpected code point. Do not use lone surrogate characters in HTML"
regex.target: description: "意外的码点。不要在HTML中使用孤立的代理项字符"

regex.source: description: "Unexpected code point `%x`. Do not use lone surrogate characters in HTML"
regex.target: description: "意外的码点 `%x`。不要在HTML中使用孤立的代理项字符"
description: "`%c` 处出现意外字符。应为 `>`"

regex.source: description: "Unexpected `%c`. Expected whitespace, `/`, `>`, `=`, or probably an ASCII letter"
regex.target: description: "意外的 `%c`。应为空白、`/`、`>`、`=` 或可能为ASCII字母"

regex.target: description: "意外的 `%c`。请用引号括起属性值以包含它"

regex.target: description: "意外的码点 `%x`。不要在HTML中使用NULL字符"

regex.source: description: "Unexpected `%c-1`. Expected it followed by `>` or in a quoted attribute value"
regex.target: description: "意外的 `%c-1`。应后跟 `>` 或位于带引号的属性值中"

regex.source: description: "Unexpected character reference. Expected known named character references"
regex.target: description: "意外的字符引用。应为已知的命名字符引用"
